features.title: State encoder — card ID embedding
features.desc: Vocab-based card ID encoding (606 cards), normalized by vocab_size

features.title: State encoder — hand encoding
features.desc: 10 slots × 11 floats: id, cost, type×3, can_play, target, empty, damage, block, draw

features.title: State encoder — enemy encoding
features.desc: 3 enemy slots × 5 floats: hp, block, is_attacking, damage, empty

features.title: State encoder — player encoding
features.desc: hp_norm, block_norm, buff_count, incoming_damage

features.title: State encoder — buff encoding
features.desc: Top 30 buff magnitudes, alphabetical, normalized

features.title: Action mask — playable cards
features.desc: Mask invalid actions by energy cost, can_play flag

features.title: Action mask — target selection
features.desc: AnyEnemy cards → 3 targets, others → no-target slot

features.title: Action decode — play_card
features.desc: Decode action index → {card_index, target_index}

features.title: Action decode — end_turn
features.desc: Action 40 = end_turn, always valid

features.title: Combat env — episode lifecycle
features.desc: reset/start game → advance to combat → step → done

features.title: Combat env — stuck detection
features.desc: Detect end_turn ignored, unstick with proceed, kill after 5 retries

features.title: Combat env — process management
features.desc: Subprocess lifecycle: _start_proc, _kill_proc, _send, _read_json

features.title: Damage reward
features.desc: 0.15 × enemy_hp_lost / start_enemy_hp per step

features.title: HP preservation penalty
features.desc: -0.25 × player_hp_lost / max_hp per step

features.title: Block effectiveness reward
features.desc: 0.10 × effective_block / max_hp when blocking incoming

features.title: Per-step time penalty
features.desc: -0.01 per step to encourage fast combat

features.title: Combat win reward
features.desc: 3.0 × hp_ratio + survival bonus (up to +1.0)

features.title: Terminal reward
features.desc: +2.0 victory, -2.0 defeat

features.title: Timeout penalty
features.desc: -2.0 + truncated episode at max_combat_steps=80

features.title: Reward scaling validation
features.desc: Unit test verifying reward magnitudes across combat scenarios

features.title: MaskablePPO integration
features.desc: sb3-contrib MaskablePPO with MlpPolicy, action masking

features.title: Network architecture
features.desc: Separate pi/vf heads, [256, 256] each

features.title: Anti-collapse: entropy bonus
features.desc: ent_coef=0.5 to maintain exploration

features.title: Anti-collapse: clip range
features.desc: clip_range=0.1 for conservative policy updates

features.title: Multi-environment training
features.desc: n_envs=4 DummyVecEnv for data diversity

features.title: Curriculum learning
features.desc: 3-phase: floor≤4 → floor≤8 → full game

features.title: Progress callback
features.desc: Real-time steps/sec, ETA, entropy/value_loss display

features.title: Learning rate schedule
features.desc: Linear LR decay from 1e-4 to 0 over training

features.title: Card scoring system
features.desc: 0-10 score per card: DPE, BPE, effects, overrides

features.title: Card scoring — manual overrides
features.desc: 50+ card overrides: Feed 9.5, Demon Form 9.5, Strike 2.0

features.title: Card scoring — attack formula
features.desc: damage/cost normalized against Strike baseline (6 DPE)

features.title: Card scoring — skill formula
features.desc: block/cost + draw + energy value

features.title: Card reward selection
features.desc: Pick highest-score card if ≥ 3.5 threshold, else skip

features.title: Shop buy strategy
features.desc: Buy best score/cost ratio card, prefer removal first

features.title: Card removal (deck thinning)
features.desc: Remove lowest-score card (Strike/Defend priority)

features.title: Card scoring — context-aware
features.desc: Adjust scores by deck composition (e.g. already have 3 attacks → deprioritize)

features.title: Map strategy interface
features.desc: Protocol class with choose(state, choices) → action

features.title: Act1SafeStrategy
features.desc: Priority: Rest > Shop(gold≥100) > Event > Monster > Elite

features.title: Map strategy — HP-aware routing
features.desc: Avoid elites when HP < 50%, prefer rest when low

features.title: Map strategy — Act2 adaptation
features.desc: Different risk tolerance per act (Act 2 more aggressive)

features.title: Coordinator — RL eval mode
features.desc: eval-rl mode: RL for combat, heuristic for non-combat

features.title: Coordinator — stuck recovery
features.desc: Error retry logic, proceed unstick, consecutive error limit

features.title: Train-eval loop
features.desc: Autonomous train→eval→log→resume cycle

features.title: Training metrics logging
features.desc: Tensorboard + JSONL: entropy, value_loss, clip_fraction

features.title: Eval metrics — combat analysis
features.desc: Log per-combat: cards played, damage dealt/taken, turns

features.title: Eval metrics — floor heatmap
features.desc: Track death floor distribution across eval games

features.title: Observation — enemy intent detail
features.desc: Encode intent type (attack/defend/buff/debuff) not just is_attacking

features.title: Observation — relic encoding
features.desc: Add relic info to obs vector (currently missing!)

features.title: Observation — potion encoding
features.desc: Add potion slots to obs (currently missing!)

features.title: Observation — deck composition
features.desc: Encode draw/discard pile stats for strategic decisions

features.title: Reward — enemy kill bonus
features.desc: Extra reward for killing an enemy (not just damage dealt)

features.title: Reward — efficient turn bonus
features.desc: Reward spending all energy (encourages full energy usage)

features.title: SubprocVecEnv parallel training
features.desc: True multi-process env for 4x throughput
